name: threejs-water
title: Hyper-Real Water
desc: Raytraced reflections, refractions & caustics — Evan Wallace's classic, drawn cheap and projected sharp.

name: raymarch
title: Raymarch
desc: Orbiting spheres, soft shadows, an infinite reflective plane — a hand-written GPU shader.

name: julia
title: Julia Bloom
desc: A living fractal — orbit-trap filaments and a violet-to-gold bloom that reshapes as you move the cursor.

name: nebula
title: Cosmic Flow
desc: A domain-warped nebula — violet clouds, magenta cores and drifting starlight you steer by moving the cursor.

name: gyroid
title: Iridescent Gyroid
desc: A flowing triply-periodic minimal surface with an oil-on-metal sheen — drag to orbit the structure.
